descriptors.2: Minor variable rename or config tweak
descriptors.3: Moderate logic change, new condition or branch
descriptors.5: Complex algorithm, architectural change, or critical fix

descriptors.1: Commit message completely misleading or unrelated to actual changes
descriptors.2: Vague message, barely related to diff content
descriptors.3: Partially describes changes, missing important details
descriptors.5: Perfect match between commit message and actual code changes

descriptors.1: No meaningful value to the project
descriptors.3: Useful improvement or standard bug fix
descriptors.5: Critical contribution, core functionality or architecture
